arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano Drops Update on Man Utd, Arsenal, Tottenham Target Matheus Cunha
arts.sum: Matheus Cunha has voiced his eagerness to move from Wolves and Fabrizio Romano has issued an update on his future

arts.ttl: Jaap Stam points the finger at Ruben Amorim for 'holding back' £72m star as Man United legend names one player the club must move on
arts.sum: Jaap Stam insists Ruben Amorim's style of play is failing to get the best out of Man United's forward talent. Thirteenth-placed Man United have scored just 37 Premier League goals this season.

arts.ttl: Paul Pogba issues cryptic three-word message as former Man United star eyes return
arts.sum: Paul Pogba's future in football is uncertain with the ex-Manchester United man still a free agent

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola has already confirmed one Manchester City player will start vs Nottingham Forest at Wembley
Ex-Man United Man Ander Herrera Cries After Return to Football is Cut Short
arts.sum: Former Manchester United favourite Ander Herrera was spotted in tears as he was forced off injured five minutes into his return for Boca Juniors.

arts.ttl: Martin Tyler ‘really annoyed’ by Man Utd bias claims with Liverpool stance made clear
arts.sum: Martin Tyler spent over three decades as the voice of the Premier League for Sky Sports and has long been accused of favouring Manchester United over Liverpool

arts.ttl: The real Bruno Fernandes: Uncovering the hidden side of Man United's 'Captain Marmite'
arts.sum: It was February 19. Manchester United's squad and a number of staff were dining at Brazilian eatery Jardim Rodizio Grill in Altrincham after an evening spent tenpin bowling.

arts.ttl: Manchester United Chido Obi decision says everything about Ayden Heaven
arts.sum: Man United have two young stars for the future in Chido Obi and Ayden Heaven but only one of them is currently indispensable to Ruben Amorim this season.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim explains why Marcus Rashford's revival at Aston Villa is GOOD news for Man United after he banished the in-form England striker
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has welcomed Marcus Rashford's revival, saying the player's return to form on loan at Aston Villa and England recall is good news for Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim makes 'confident' Man Utd prediction and issues demand to stars
arts.sum: Manchester United beat both Real Sociedad and Leicester by three goals before the international break, giving Ruben Amorim reasons to be optimistic ahead of the run-in
